archetype: Archetype 2: The Performance Pro (Elite Athleticism & Precision) + Corporate Blend
rationale: Fitness apps thrive on dark, high-energy visuals. Combining deep obsidian/carbon black with an electric neon accent (Lime/Cyan) captures the 'Performance Pro' aesthetic, while the clean typography and strict grids maintain the professional, data-dense requirements of a corporate CRM.

spacing_and_layout.strategy: MODE B: THE CONTROL ROOM GRID (Dense, functional, optimized for analytics and tables)

surface_strategies.cards: bg-zinc-900/40 border border-zinc-800 rounded-lg hover:border-zinc-700/50 transition-colors duration-200 shadow-sm
surface_strategies.header: sticky top-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-zinc-950/80 border-b border-zinc-800 h-16 flex items-center px-6
surface_strategies.sidebar: fixed left-0 top-0 h-screen w-64 bg-zinc-950 border-r border-zinc-800 flex flex-col
surface_strategies.kanban_column: bg-zinc-900/20 border border-zinc-800/60 rounded-lg p-3 flex flex-col h-full
surface_strategies.kanban_card: bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 rounded-md p-3 shadow-md hover:-translate-y-0.5 transition-transform cursor-grab active:cursor-grabbing

buttons.primary: bg-lime-400 text-zinc-950 font-bold rounded-md px-4 py-2 hover:bg-lime-500 transition-all active:scale-95 flex items-center justify-center gap-2
buttons.secondary: bg-zinc-800 text-zinc-50 font-semibold rounded-md px-4 py-2 hover:bg-zinc-700 border border-zinc-700 transition-all flex items-center justify-center gap-2
buttons.ghost: text-zinc-300 hover:text-white hover:bg-zinc-800/50 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-md transition-colors

components.inputs: bg-zinc-950 border border-zinc-800 rounded-md px-3 py-2 text-sm text-zinc-50 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-lime-400 focus:border-transparent placeholder:text-zinc-600 w-full outline-none transition-all

tables.wrapper: w-full text-left text-sm text-zinc-300 border border-zinc-800 rounded-md overflow-hidden
tables.header: bg-zinc-900/80 text-zinc-400 font-semibold uppercase text-xs tracking-wider

components.badges: px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider bg-zinc-800 text-zinc-300 border border-zinc-700

images.description: Abstract sleek dark geometric background. To be used as the 50% left side visual on the Login view.
Premium gym texture. Use at 10% opacity as a background pattern in the Admin Backdoor Dashboard or Settings header.
Professional avatar for Manager or Admin dashboard profile pictures.
Professional avatar for Sales Consultant profile pictures.
Minimalist 'R' logo for Revival Fitness. Include UI in admin settings to allow updating this image.

views_and_pages.name: Login
views_and_pages.description: Split screen. Immersive geometric dark texture on the left, clean corporate login form on the right. Must support different roles.

views_and_pages.name: Dashboard (Role-based)
views_and_pages.description: Control center using Mode B grid. Adapts based on Admin vs Manager vs Consultant.
key_elements: KPI Metric Cards (Total Sales, Lead Conversion, Response Time)

views_and_pages.name: Lead Management & Pipeline
views_and_pages.description: Kanban style drag-and-drop pipeline interface with an option for standard List View. Horizontal scrolling for columns.
key_elements: Pipeline Columns: New, Contacted, Engaged, Appt Set, Showed Up, Trial, Closed Won/Lost
Deal Tracking Modal: Triggers specifically when dropping a card into 'Closed Won'. Contains tabs for Cash vs Debit Order.

views_and_pages.name: Admin Backdoor & Integrations
views_and_pages.description: Password-protected area for system settings. Two-column layout with vertical tabs.
key_elements: WhatsApp Automation Card (Show mock QR code scan for Puppeteer setup)
User Management & Consultant Exit Workflow (reassign all leads button)

accessibility_and_motion.motion: Use Framer Motion. Keep animations fast, linear, and corporate (e.g., duration: 0.15s, opacity fades, subtle y-axis sliding). Avoid bouncy or elastic effects.
accessibility_and_motion.hover_states: All interactive elements MUST clearly change on hover (e.g., background shifts, border highlights).
accessibility_and_motion.focus_states: Visible focus rings are mandatory. Use ring-2 ring-lime-400 ring-offset-2 ring-offset-zinc-950.
accessibility_and_motion.testing: All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='submit-deal-button', data-testid='lead-stage-dropdown').

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: XAC CRM is built purely in JavaScript (.js/.jsx). DO NOT create or use TypeScript (.ts/.tsx) files.
Install marquee (optional for activity ticker): yarn add react-fast-marquee
Use Shadcn UI components heavily, but strip Vercel-like aesthetics and replace with our high-contrast Performance Pro dark styling (zinc-950 base, lime-400 CTA).

For the 'Closed Won' deal tracking modal, use the Shadcn Dialog component containing Shadcn Tabs. Tab 1: 'Cash' (Sales Value, Term, Units), Tab 2: 'Debit Order' (Joining Fee, Debit Order Value, Units).
Build a robust sidebar navigation (collapsible for mobile).
Ensure 'Admin Backdoor' settings includes a specific input mapped to update the logo image displayed in the nav/sidebar.
Mock the 'WhatsApp Automation' connection status. It should have a visual 'Scan QR' state.
For forms, use Shadcn Form elements with proper labeling. DO NOT use native <select>, use Shadcn Dropdown/Select.
Ensure all data-testids are implemented as requested for automated testing.
Implement the Kanban board using a CSS grid or flexbox layout with custom state management for drag-and-drop, avoiding heavy external DND libraries if possible, or use @hello-pangea/dnd.
